title: Realistic MC
description:
Realistic MC Is A ModPack Aiming to Improve the visuals of Minecraft as well as add some quality of life additions

This Version Now Only Exists For Archiving. The New Version Is Located In The Discription.
body:
Uses Fabric

## This Modpack will no longer be Receiving Updates

### What is Realistic MC?

Realistic MC Is A ModPack Aiming To Improve Visuals while also adding quality of life changes.

### [RealisticMC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rmc+)



## If My Mod is added and i dont want it to be in this modpack what can i do?

you can contact me via my [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/FLAME_THE_RAGER)

## What Mods Are Recomended to be added as well?

[Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna/posts)

[Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)

[Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)

-----------------------------------------------------------

[Logo/gallery Assets](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/19Ld5-7ik3dX3tQwQMzOZzjCjQVF5V2wD?usp=drive_link)

Known Bugs: 

| **When You Place Sand Over Water The Game Instantly Crashes** |


Want To Play Pre-Release Versions Of This Modpack? [Go Here!](https://forms.gle/2umSchA8sbpRRZnS9)

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

## What Mods Are Included?

3D Skin Layers

Ambient Sounds

Cave Dust

Chat Heads

Clumps

Continuity (Activate though Resource Packs)

Drip Sounds

Eating Animation

Entity Culling

falling Leaves

First-Person Model

Sodium

Iris Shaders

Replay Mod

Mod Menu

Model Gap Fix

Presence Footsteps

Reese's Sodium Options

Simple voice Chat

sound physics Remastered

Wavey Capes

## Shaders In this Modpack

Nostalgia Shaders

Complementary Shaders

Builder's QOL Shaders

BSL Shaders

Insanity Shaders

Kappa Shader (Recomended for best experiance)

## library's In This modpack

Cloth Config API

CreativeCore

Fabric API

</details>


<details>
<summary>QNA</summary>

## QNA

Q: Will This be Updated?

A: Hopefully so.

Q: Are You Active On twitter?

A: Not As Much As other People.

Q: will You Remove Mods When Asked?

A: Yes, However The Mod Included Area will be added with the link to the mod so people can get it that way, If I Forget to remove the mods in testing I am sorry (i have bad memory.)

</details>
